# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User expects substantial structural refactoring, not superficial file organization changes, when reducing large class size.
- The user expects existing code to be reused as much as possible, and not rewritten from scratch, when refactoring or adding new features.
- Unit tests should be comprehensive and cover all new features and refactored code to ensure functionality and prevent regressions. 
- The user prefers to avoid introducing interfaces unless they are necessary for the design or functionality of the code.
